item.title: Site Criticism Team - Staff Post
item.content:encoded:
Noting that this wikiwalk footer was messed up, as the previous button linked to the current page. I fixed.

If you're gonna add the footer, at least make sure you've done it right, please.

item.title: Junior Staff Post
item.content:encoded: The original image is CC BY-SA 3.0, by cerber0. It has since been restored.

item.title: (no title)
item.content:encoded: The first interview is a little off at least at the start I feel that you forgot the whole "apartments only in Asia" idea, I feel like changing up what they where doing before would make this more natural.

item.title: (no title)
item.content:encoded:
This article was missing the

« SCP-2202 | SCP-2202 | SCP-2203 »

I added it in.

item.title: (no title)
item.content:encoded:
Honestly, I feel this worked better before the 'business card we can't use' thing. The non-working mail and phone numbers are (to me) a cop-out thing.

Other than that, the idea is pretty nice, the voices are enough for me, and without the card it would be even weirder… since it implies the person -could- contact them on their own somehow.

Other than that, seems to be missing the prev-next thing in the bottom. Would add it myself but no idea how, and I'm from the phone…

item.title: (no title)
item.content:encoded:
Heyyyy, good to see this on the mainsite! Gets an upvote from me, since I like the straightforward premise. And I could definitely use one of these vacations. Closest I can get is going to pet stores and looking at the cool fish and lizards and occasional bird.

+1 from me here!

item.title: (no title)
item.content:encoded:
This is so Series 2, I had to check to make sure I didn't write it. Which I dig. I wore 30x30 pants during Series 2. It was good times.

I don't care for the addendum at the end. It's not a satisfying explanation, and in lieu of that, you might be better off with no elaboration whatsoever. It just happened. The reader doesn't get to know who or why or how it happens.

Upvoted in spite of that. I'd love to be more enthusiastic about it, but I feel the ending is a real issue. But I like it overall.

item.title: (no title)
item.content:encoded:
+ Grammatical/wording stuff I noticed:
- click to close this, idk

His last vacation was 20[XX], 3 years ago.

I feel like this should be reworded to "3 years prior to the interview" or something similar.

Mr. Jones was given Class-A amnestics following the interview-

Reword to: "given a Class-A amnestic".

While these cards display no directly anomalous properties-

directly > direct.

Overall, this fine, and I feel that it'll do pretty well here. Not a fan of the whole "parallel earth" aspect though; I feel that the article would've been done just as well without it.

Novote for now.

item.title: SCP-2202
item.content:encoded:
My first SCP on the mainsite! Huge thanks to Zyn for helping to critique my work multiple times and helping to give my article a huge polish! It would have been of way lower quality without her help, and I really appreciate it.

Hope y'all enjoy it!

Image source: https://search.creativecommons.org/photos/7b7d29e0-fe1d-4331-8655-791f108bceac
"Heartland : Nightlife" by 'besar bears' licensed under CC BY-ND 2.0
